zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Cave於1370年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir John Cave30歲，母親Lady Maria Genille20歲。他於1387年與Catherine de Sommerville在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年7月在英國英格蘭越可爾享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Cave was born in 1370, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Cave, was 30 and his mother, Lady Maria Genille, was 20. He married Catherine de Sommerville in 1387, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in July 1407, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Cave est né en 1370, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Cave, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Maria Genille, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Sommerville en 1387, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1407, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

Lui sposato Catherine de Sommerville nel 1387, nel Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ko.North Cave, East Riding of Yorkshire Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 노르스 카브

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Cave(이)가 1370년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cave(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maria Genille(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Catherine de Sommerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Cave родился в 1370 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cave было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maria Genille, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Sommerville в 1387 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер июль 1407 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Cave nació en 1370, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Cave, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Maria Genille, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catherine de Sommerville en 1387, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1407, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
